@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-4573-implement-go-templates-as-a-composition-function",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function",
+    "description": "Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\n\nWe think there will be several generic/reusable Composition Functions. Functions that folks can grab (e.g. from https://marketplace.upbound.io) and use without needing to write code."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function",
+        "description": "Install the Go Templating Composition Function from the crossplane-contrib repository:\n```bash\n# Install function-go-templating as a Crossplane package\nkubectl apply -f - <<EOF\napiVersion: pkg.crossplane.io/v1beta1\nkind: Function\nmetadata:\n  name: function-go-templating\nspec:\n  package: xpkg.upbound.io/crossplane-contrib/function-go-templating:v0.4.1\nEOF\n```\nThen use Go templates in your Compositions to define how composite resources map to managed resources. See the function-go-templating repository (https://github.com/crossplane-contrib/function-go-templating) for examples and documentation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Go Templates were implemented as a Composition Function in the separate function-go-templating repository (https://github.com/crossplane-contrib/function-go-templating). This function allows users to define Crossplane compositions using Go templates, providing a flexible and familiar templating language for generating composed resources.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+    },

+  },
